headline: Stryker Cyberattack Tests Digital Growth Story And Healthcare Supply Resilience
summary: Stryker (NYSE:SYK) was hit by a significant cyberattack linked to an Iran based group, disrupting global operations, manufacturing, and order processing. The attack led to outages, wiped devices, and forced shutdowns in dozens of countries, raising concerns about supply chain continuity for healthcare providers. The incident has drawn attention to cyber risks in critical sectors such as medical devices and hospital equipment. For investors watching Stryker at a share price of $336.77, the...
